title: Crisp Bitter Mediterranean Lentils Tagine
description: A vibrant, dairy‑free tagine featuring bitter spices, crisp vegetables, and aromatic ground ginger that delivers a complex Mediterranean flavor profile.
instructions: Rinse lentils under cold water and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large, heavy‑bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic; sauté until onion turns translucent, about 4–5 minutes.
Stir in sliced zucchini, ground ginger, smoked paprika, and cumin; cook for another 2 minutes, letting the spices bloom.
Whisk the lemon juice with vegetable broth in a small bowl, then pour this mixture into the pot, followed by diced tomatoes and lentils.
Bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until lentils are tender.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper, adjust acidity with additional lemon juice if desired.
Remove from heat, stir in chopped parsley, and serve hot over couscous, rice, or fresh flatbread.
